use_cases: Displaying daily or weekly screen time statistics in health and wellness tracking dashboards
Showing app usage breakdown with animated visualization for user analytics products
Presenting hourly usage patterns with total time summaries in productivity monitoring tools
Serving as a reusable card component in multi-metric analytics interfaces
ai_summary: A screen time dashboard card component featuring an animated bar graph showing usage over time, prominent total hours/minutes display, and a ranked list of top apps with icons and durations. Uses Framer Motion for spring-based bar animations and glass-morphism styling with gradient backgrounds and backdrop blur. Supports dark mode and includes normalized bar height calculations for consistent visualization.
